title: Italian Lasagna Delight
description: A classic Italian dish with a twist of Turkish delight, layered with tender lasagna noodles and rich flavors.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the ricotta cheese, crushed Turkish delight, and Italian seasonings.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, mushroom mixture, and shredded mozzarella cheese.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Top with shredded parmesan cheese and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Let the lasagna rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
